case_title: MARTA SALMERON VS. DOLORES FLORES et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, DOLORES

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALMERON, MARTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SALMERON, MARTA AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, DOLORES FLORES, AURORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, AURORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. RAQUEL VARGAR INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALMERON, MARTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLORES, DOLORES FLORES, AURORA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
